ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: De universo genere quas serio ludebat libri quinque.
ItacWorkItem.Notes: For full list book`s images, and related texts (1574 edition), see The Study and Digitisation of Italian Emblems, University of Glasgow (http://www.italianemblems.arts.gla.ac.uk/books.php). See also Anne Rolet, `Achille Bocchi`s Symbolicarum quaestionum`, in Mundus emblematicus. Studies in Neo-Latin Emblem Books, ed. K. Enenkel and A Visser (Brepols, 2003).
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: Curia Episc. et S. Inquisit. concessu
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
